dataset: Wallace Creek / San Andreas Fault Offset

pi_items.metadata_value: San Andreas Fault right-lateral offset, ~128.6m accumulated over ~3700 years
pi_items.verified_value: San Andreas Fault right-lateral offset, 128m accumulated over ~3700 years
pi_items.source: Sieh and Jahns (1984), Geological Society of America Bulletin

privileged_info_summary: Wallace Creek is located at coordinates 35.2715, -119.8272 in the Carrizo Plain. It features a prominent right-lateral offset along the San Andreas Fault, with the modern channel having been offset by approximately 128 to 128.6 meters over a period of roughly 3,700 years.
